    Jeno Gyuris

    http://www.mitotix.com
    email: gyuris@mitotix.com

    My current research interests include gene therapy, the development of novel genetic/pharmacogenetic approaches to angiogenesis, the manipulation of cell fate and genetic approaches to the isolation of tumor specific survival genes.
